subject: [PATCH v4 02/21] swap: rearrange the swap header file

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's impact on existing code and suggested that a more thorough review is needed before applying it.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch rearranges the swap header file to group related functions into categories, including lifecycle swap functions, swap cache API, and physical swapfile allocator and swap device API. The changes are purely organizational and do not introduce any functional changes.
